mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM order_item WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND seller_id = #{sellerId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO order_item (order_id, product_id, product_name, product_image, price, quantity, subtotal, seller_id, create_time) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{productId}, #{productName}, #{productImage}, #{price}, #{quantity}, #{subtotal}, #{sellerId}, NOW())

INSERT INTO order_item (order_id, product_id, product_name, product_image, price, quantity, subtotal, seller_id, create_time) VALUES
(#{item.orderId}, #{item.productId}, #{item.productName}, #{item.productImage}, #{item.price}, #{item.quantity}, #{item.subtotal}, #{item.sellerId}, NOW())
